mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month growth in nonfarm payrolls raises expected household income and corporate revenue breadth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the payroll trend is above its own trailing median.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value for 2018-12-01 was 150263.0 as of the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if PAYEMS 3-month growth has Rank IC below 0.03 with 20-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year rolling window, or if above-median payroll growth does not outperform below-median growth.

mechanism_narrative: A rising federal funds rate increases equity discount rates and tightens financial conditions, reducing the present value of future earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by more than 0.50 percentage points over 6 months and is above 2.0%
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value for 2018-12-01 was 2.27 as of the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the mean triggered return is not below the unconditional mean by at least 25 basis points.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales growth accompanied by stable or rising housing starts identifies broad household demand strength, increasing expected cyclicals earnings and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth is positive and HOUST 3-month growth is nonnegative
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value for 2018-11-01 was 513531.0 and HOUST vintage value was 1256.0 as of the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint RSAFS-HOUST trigger has lower average 20-day S&P 500 returns than cases where only one condition is satisfied, or if triggered win rate is below the unconditional positive-day rate.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production signals weaker factory output and margin pressure for cyclical firms, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days after output momentum turns down.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value for 2018-11-01 was 109.3931 as of the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside crossings are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered instances or if downside crossings do not underperform upside crossings.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices during a rising-rate period indicates restrictive policy without improving real demand, compressing valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth exceeds its 12-month growth and FEDFUNDS 3-month change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value for 2018-12-01 was 252.733 and FEDFUNDS vintage value was 2.27 as of the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS interaction term has nonnegative coefficient in walk-forward return regressions, or if triggered 60-day returns exceed the unconditional mean return.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth signals expanding aggregate demand and supports earnings expectations across sectors, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days when the latest available GDP level is above its prior quarter.
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest vintage available in the snapshot was 2018-07-01 with value 18664.973 as of the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive quarter-over-quarter GDPC1 growth fails to deliver higher average 60-day S&P 500 returns than negative or flat growth in at least 70% of walk-forward training windows.

mechanism_narrative: A meaningful rise in unemployment from its recent low marks labor-market deterioration and recession risk, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises at least 0.3 percentage points above its trailing 12-month low
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value for 2018-12-01 was 3.9 as of the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered returns are not below non-triggered returns.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rebound in housing starts signals improving interest-sensitive demand and construction activity, leading investors to raise near-term growth expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value for 2018-11-01 was 1256.0 as of the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST upside crossings have a 5-day S&P 500 win rate below the unconditional 5-day win rate or if the average triggered 5-day return is negative.
